title: The Train Story
description: Modpack based on Railways Untold mod that generates infinite, procedural train tracks from the Create mod in your world. Surviving on the your train
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7f460cd6355e4f3a3444a015b876b4e442200e2.png)
# ENG 
Modpack based on Railways Untold mod that generates infinite, procedural train tracks from the Create mod in your world!

Transform your train into a factory with wheels and rails!

Explore the world with your friends, have more fun together!

# RUS
Модпак основан на моде Railways Untold, который генерирует бесконечные процедурные железнодорожные пути из Create в мире!

Преврати свой поезд в завод на колёсах и рельсах!

Исследуйте мир со своими друзьями, вместе веселее!
